race.comment: Former Victorian LA ROSETTA (8) has won three of her four starts since joining the new stable with jockey Youngberry being in the saddle on all three occasions. Again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim and it's hard to knock mares in form. Looks very hard to toss. MELTDOWN (6) saves his best form for this circuit with two wins and a placing from four spins and will be high on confidence following back-to-back victories. Sure to play a major role. DON'TCHA THINK (10) is an honest commodity who has hit the top-five at his past 11 starts and doesn't know how to run a bad race. A must for the multiples. KURITHEA (13) is one from one over this mile journey and must be respected out of the Archibald yard. In the mix. KATDEEL (3) best of the rest with Rodd on board.
